name: node-data-uri-to-buffer
title: node-data-uri-to-buffer
summary: Node.js module that generate a Buffer instance from a Data URI string
description:
Node.js module that generate a Buffer instance from a Data URI string
node-data-uri-to-buffer accepts a "data" URI string of data and returns a
Node.js Buffer instance with the decoded data.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-data-uri-to-buffer because Node.js module that generate a Buffer instance from a Data URI string.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-data-uri-to-buffer as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-data-uri-to-buffer with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-data-uri-to-buffer --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
